overview: An interactive 3D Human Body Explorer where users can rotate, zoom, and explore 3D models of body organs (brain, heart, lungs, stomach) with bilingual descriptions in Hindi and English.
features: Interactive 3D organ models with 360° rotation and zoom
Touch and mouse gesture support for all devices
Bilingual descriptions in Hindi (Devanagari) and English
Body part selector to switch between brain, heart, lungs, stomach
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
